release-mismatch.title: Release identity mismatch
diagnostics: Compare the expected commit to the live metadata commit.
Check the service metadata endpoint without changing provider state.

journey-failure.title: Post-deploy journey failure
diagnostics: Inspect the failed journey name and bounded trace metadata.
Confirm whether the service metadata still reports the expected release.

backup-stale.title: Backup evidence is stale or missing
diagnostics: Review the declared maximum backup age.
Confirm the evidence source is available without restoring live data.
Run only the approved disposable restore drill.

quota-critical.title: Quota critical or projected exhaustion
diagnostics: Review the latest quota snapshot and projection confidence.
Confirm stale or unavailable data is not being treated as healthy.

secret-plaintext.title: Potential plaintext credential pattern
diagnostics: Review the redacted file path, line number, and rule identifier.
Rotate credentials through the approved owner process only when confirmed.

registry-route-conflict.title: Contract registry route ownership conflict
diagnostics: Inspect the two ServiceContracts claiming the same origin, path, and method.
Resolve ownership in one focused registry pull request.

deploy-dependency-cycle.title: Deployment dependency cycle
diagnostics: Remove only the incorrect dependency edge through a reviewed policy change.
